fields.label: Job Card
fields.description: Select the submitted Job Card you are planning production for. Only submitted Job Cards are shown. Order Qty, Produced Qty, and Balance Qty will auto-populate.

fields.label: Order Qty
fields.description: Total quantity ordered on this Job Card. Fetched automatically from the Job Card's Quantity Ordered field.

fields.label: Produced Qty
fields.description: Total good quantity already produced across all submitted Production Entries for this Job Card.

fields.label: Balance Qty
fields.description: Remaining quantity still to be produced. Calculated as: Order Qty − Produced Qty (never goes below 0).

fields.label: Planned Qty
fields.description: The quantity you plan to produce in this run. Use this to set your daily/shift target for this Job Card.

fields.label: Planned Date
fields.description: Target date for this planned production run. Defaults to today.

fields.label: Stage
fields.description: The manufacturing stage for this planned run: Printing, Slitting, Rewinding, or Packing.

fields.label: Machine
fields.description: Specific machine to be used, e.g. Flexo 1, Slitter A. Helps track machine utilisation.

fields.label: Operator
fields.description: Name of the operator assigned to this planned run.

fields.label: Shift
fields.description: Shift during which this production is planned, e.g. Day, Night, Morning.

fields.label: Start Time
fields.description: Planned start time for this production run.

fields.label: End Time
fields.description: Planned end time for this production run.

fields.label: Downtime (mins)
fields.description: Expected machine downtime in minutes (setup, maintenance, breaks). Useful for capacity planning.

fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Any notes about this planned run — special instructions, material requirements, priority notes, etc.
